[{"url": "https://en.fmyly.com/article/how-much-is-falcon-9-per-kg", "title": "How much is Falcon 9 per kg? - Fmyly", "content": "The advertised cost of a dedicated Falcon 9 launch is approximately $67 million. Listed commercial price: $67 million for a dedicated LEO mission. Payload to LEO: approximately 22,800 kg (with reusable first stage). Payload to GTO: approximately 8,300 kg. The cost per kilogram for a full LEO payload is roughly $2,940/kg -- the lowest of any currently operational vehicle. SpaceX conducts the majority of its launches for internal Starlink deployment, with commercial and government", "score": 0.91156644, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.netizen.page/2025/05/cost-per-kilogram-to-low-earth-orbit.html", "title": "Netizen: Cost per Kilogram to Low Earth Orbit (LEO) Over Time", "content": "SpaceX has significantly reduced the cost per kilogram of payload to orbit through innovations in rocket design, particularly with the Falcon 9, Falcon Heavy, and Starship.
